warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, East Johor, Pahang, Sarawak and Eastern Sabah until 9:00PM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Johor Timur, Pahang, Sarawak dan Sabah Timur sehingga 9:00 malam; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of southern part of Phuket, Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, southern part of Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 9:00PM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan selatan Phuket, Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Tioman, Condore, selatan Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 9:00 malam; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Baling, Kulim and Bandar Baharu);  Penang  (South Seberang Perai);  Perak  (Kerian);  Pahang  (Raub, Bentong, Bera and Rompin);  Selangor  (Klang, Gombak, Petaling, Kuala Langat, Hulu Langat and Sepang);  FT Kuala Lumpur ;  FT Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan ;  Melaka ;  Johor  (Tangkak, Segamat, Muar and Mersing);  Sarawak:  Samarahan, Betong, Sarikei, Sibu, Mukah, Kapit (Song), Bintulu (Tatau), Miri (Subis) and Limbang; and  Sabah:  Interior (Sipitang, Tenom and Nabawan), West Coast (Ranau), Tawau (Tawau and Lahad Datu) and Sandakan (Telupid, Kinabatangan, Beluran and Sandakan) until 7:00PM; Tuesday, 30 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Baling, Kulim dan Bandar Baharu);  Pulau Pinang  (Seberang Perai Selatan);  Perak  (Kerian);  Pahang  (Raub, Bentong, Bera dan Rompin);  Selangor  (Klang, Gombak, Petaling, Kuala Langat, Hulu Langat dan Sepang);  WP Kuala Lumpur ;  WP Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan ;  Melaka ;  Johor  (Tangkak, Segamat, Muar dan Mersing);  Sarawak:  Samarahan, Betong, Sarikei, Sibu, Mukah, Kapit (Song), Bintulu (Tatau), Miri (Subis) dan Limbang; dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Sipitang, Tenom dan Nabawan), Pantai Barat (Ranau), Tawau (Tawau dan Lahad Datu) dan Sandakan (Telupid, Kinabatangan, Beluran dan Sandakan) sehingga 7:00 malam; Selasa, 30 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
